query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, u.platformRole, cm.companyId, cm.role as member_role, cm.isActive, c.name as company_name
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN company_members cm ON cm.userId = u.id
LEFT JOIN companies c ON c.id = cm.companyId
WHERE u.email = 'luxsess2001@gmail.com';
